scope.positioning: 360 property buying platform for foreign buyers across Alicante province
notes: Alicante province is the main umbrella.
Costa Blanca and Vega Baja are important clusters within the province, not separate strategic umbrellas.
The site should not behave like a simple listing portal.
Content must reinforce integrated buyer support: property search, area guidance, mortgage broker support, legal coordination, and end-to-end assistance.

add_municipality_when: The municipality or microarea is present in the live property feed or public site inventory.
There is clear buyer intent or international demand value for Alicante province.
It fits the province-first structure and supports a useful content cluster.
remove_municipality_when: It duplicates another municipality or should be treated as a subarea instead of a standalone municipality.
It has no meaningful inventory, no strategic content value, or creates unnecessary dilution.
do_not_do: Do not expand outside Alicante province unless explicitly requested.
Do not over-prioritize Vega Baja at the expense of the province-wide structure.
Do not treat the website as a simple portal; keep the 360 buyer-platform positioning.
